info.name: LovdUp API — Matching
info.description:
Matching system for LovdUp: match preferences, discovery, match requests, and matches.

## Prerequisites
1. Import **LovdUp API — Auth & Onboarding** and complete onboarding for at least two users
2. Both users must have a completed profile (onboardingCompleted = true)
3. Both users must have a funded wallet (coins)
4. Set the following collection variables before running:
   - `BASE_URL` — e.g. `http://localhost:5000`
   - `ACCESS_TOKEN` — auto-set after login
   - `OTHER_USER_ID` — ID of a second user to send/receive requests from
   - `MATCH_REQUEST_ID` — auto-set after creating a match request

## Flow Order
1. **Match Preferences** — set what each user is looking for
2. **Discovery** — request and view discovery matches (costs coins)
3. **Match Requests** — send, receive, and respond to requests (costs coins to send)
4. **Matches** — view resulting matches

## Auth
All routes require `Authorization: Bearer {{ACCESS_TOKEN}}`.
This is set at collection level automatically.

item.name: ⚙️ Match Preferences
item.description:
What the authenticated user is looking for in a partner.
Must be set before requesting discovery matches.

All fields are required on first save. Subsequent calls update in place (upsert).

body.raw:
{
  "preferredGenders": ["Woman"],
  "ageMin": 22,
  "ageMax": 35,
  "locationPreference": "Same country",
  "religionPreference": "Christian",
  "culturePreference": "Open to all",
  "childrenPreference": "Want children",
  "faithPractice": "Somewhat",
  "energyDescription": "Calm",
  "communicationStyle": "Direct",
  "tuesdayFeeling": "Netflix at home",
  "energyMatchStyle": "Complement each other",
  "ambitionImportance": "Very",
  "socialLevel": "Balanced",
  "lifestylePreference": "Social drinker ok",
  "financialStabilityPreference": "Stable",
  "financialStagePreference": "Building",
  "idealPartnerType": "Someone grounded, kind, and ambitious",
  "matchVoicePrompt": "I want someone I can build with",
  "minCompatibilityScore": 50
}

request.description:
Create or update the authenticated user's match preferences.
This is an upsert — safe to call multiple times.

**Body fields**

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `preferredGenders` | string[] | `"Woman"` \| `"Man"` \| `"Non-binary"` — normalized to enum internally |
| `ageMin` | int | 18–99 |
| `ageMax` | int | 18–99, must be ≥ ageMin |
| `locationPreference` | string | `"Same city"` \| `"Same country"` \| `"Anywhere"` |
| `religionPreference` | string | Specific religion or `"Open to all"` |
| `culturePreference` | string | Free text |
| `childrenPreference` | string | e.g. `"Want children"`, `"Don't want children"`, `"Open"` |
| `faithPractice` | string | `"Not very"` \| `"Somewhat"` \| `"Very"` |
| `energyDescription` | string | Free text |
| `communicationStyle` | string | Free text |
| `tuesdayFeeling` | string | Free text |
| `energyMatchStyle` | string | Free text |
| `ambitionImportance` | string | Free text |
| `socialLevel` | string | `"Very social"` \| `"Homebody"` \| `"Balanced"` |
| `lifestylePreference` | string | `"Sober only"` \| `"Social drinker ok"` \| `"Any"` |
| `financialStabilityPreference` | string | Free text |
| `financialStagePreference` | string | Free text |
| `idealPartnerType` | string | Free text |
| `matchVoicePrompt` | string | 6–500 chars |
| `minCompatibilityScore` | int | 0–100, default 50. Candidates below this are not shown. |

🔒 Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{ACCESS_TOKEN}}`

response.name: 400 ageMin > ageMax
400 Invalid gender value
400 Invalid locationPreference
400 matchVoicePrompt too short

request.description:
Returns the authenticated user's current match preferences.
Returns 404 if preferences have not been set yet.

🔒 Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{ACCESS_TOKEN}}`

response.name: 200 Preferences found
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "pref_abc123",

    "preferredGenders": ["WOMAN"],
    "ageMin": 22,
    "ageMax": 35,

    "religionPreference": "Christian",
    "culturePreference": "Open to all",
    "childrenPreference": "Want children",
    "faithPractice": "Somewhat",
    "energyDescription": "Calm",
    "communicationStyle": "Direct",
    "tuesdayFeeling": "Netflix at home",
    "energyMatchStyle": "Complement each other",
    "ambitionImportance": "Very",
    "socialLevel": "Balanced",
    "lifestylePreference": "Social drinker ok",
    "financialStabilityPreference": "Stable",
    "financialStagePreference": "Building",
    "idealPartnerType": "Someone grounded, kind, and ambitious",
    "matchVoicePrompt": "I want someone I can build with",

}

item.name: 🔍 Discovery
item.description:
Discovery generates a curated batch of compatible profiles for the viewer.

**Cost:** Requesting new matches debits coins from the viewer's wallet.
**How it works:**
1. Pulls a candidate pool filtered by the viewer's preferred genders and age range
2. Scores each candidate across identity, values, lifestyle, and location
3. Filters out candidates below `minCompatibilityScore`
4. Returns the top 2 ranked candidates
5. Saves results so the same candidates are not shown again

Viewing the latest batch is free — only generating a new batch costs coins.

request.description:
Generates a new batch of compatible candidates for the authenticated user.

**Costs coins.** The price is configured server-side via `pricing.service.js` under `discovery.requestMatches`.

**Prerequisites**
- User must have match preferences set (`PUT /match-preferences`)
- User must have sufficient coin balance
- At least one other completed profile must exist that fits the preference filters

**Returns** up to 2 ranked candidates with compatibility scores.

**Candidates are excluded from future pools** once shown — call this again to get fresh results.

🔒 Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{ACCESS_TOKEN}}`

response.name: 200 Candidates returned
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Discovery matches generated",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "user_abc",
      "profileId": "profile_abc",
      "firstName": "Amara",
      "lastName": "Osei",
      "name": "Amara Osei",
      "age": 28,
      "gender": "WOMAN",
      "city": "London",
      "country": "United Kingdom",
      "occupation": "Architect",
      "languages": ["English", "Twi"],
      "aboutMe": "Creative soul who loves design and good conversation.",
      "snippet": "Creative soul who loves design and good conversation.",
      "photo": "https://res.cloudinary.com/lovdup/image/upload/v1/photos/user_abc/1.jpg",
      "photos": [
        {
          "id": "photo_1",
          "url": "https://res.cloudinary.com/lovdup/image/upload/v1/photos/user_abc/1.jpg",
          "isPrimary": true,
          "position": 1
        }
      ],
      "matchScore": 82,
      "voicePrompt": {
        "id": "va_abc",
        "url": "https://res.cloudinary.com/lovdup/video/upload/v1/voices/user_abc/1.webm",
        "durationSeconds": 28,
        "transcript": "I want someone who challenges me to grow.",
        "question": "What makes you feel loved?",
        "category": "relationship"
      }
    }
  ]
}

response.name: 400 No match preferences set

request.description:
Returns the most recently generated discovery batch for the viewer.

**Free** — does not debit coins. Used to re-render the current batch on app reload or navigation back.

Returns an empty array if no matches have been generated yet.

🔒 Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{ACCESS_TOKEN}}`

item.name: 💌 Match Requests
item.description:
A match request is sent from one user to another after viewing their discovery card.

**Cost:** Sending a request debits coins from the sender's wallet.

**Auto-match logic:** If a reverse PENDING request already exists from the receiver to the sender, both requests are immediately accepted and a Match is created — no manual response needed.

**Expiry:** Requests expire after `MATCH_REQUEST_EXPIRY_DAYS` days (configured in env). Expired requests are handled gracefully on response.

request.description:
Send a match request to another user.

**Costs coins.** Price configured under `matching.requestMatch`.

**Body fields**

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `receiverId` | string (uuid) | required — target user's ID |
| `type` | string | `"LIKE"` \| `"SUPER_LIKE"` |
| `message` | string | optional, max 500 chars |
| `voiceNoteUrl` | string \| null | optional — URL of an uploaded voice note |

**Auto-match:** If the receiver has already sent a PENDING request to you, both requests are accepted and a Match is created immediately. The response still returns the created request, but its `status` will be `"ACCEPTED"`.

**Test script** auto-saves `MATCH_REQUEST_ID` for the respond endpoint.

🔒 Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{ACCESS_TOKEN}}`

response.name: 201 Request sent
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Match request sent",
  "data": {
    "id": "req_abc123",
    "senderId": "user_me",
    "receiverId": "user_other",
    "type": "LIKE",
    "status": "PENDING",
    "message": "Hey, I think we'd really connect.",
    "voiceNoteUrl": null,
    "expiresAt": "2024-02-15T10:00:00.000Z",
    "createdAt": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

response.name: 400 Cannot send to yourself
400 Receiver profile incomplete
400 Receiver inactive / suspended
400 Invalid type
409 Request already exists

request.description:
Returns all match requests sent by the authenticated user, ordered by most recent.

Includes receiver profile and photos for each request.

🔒 Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{ACCESS_TOKEN}}`

response.name: 200 Sent requests

request.description:
Returns all match requests received by the authenticated user, ordered by most recent.

Includes sender profile and photos for each request. Use `status` to filter PENDING ones in the UI.

🔒 Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{ACCESS_TOKEN}}`

Accept or reject a received match request.

Only the **receiver** of the request can call this endpoint.
Only `PENDING` requests can be responded to.

**Body fields**

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `status` | string | `"ACCEPTED"` \| `"REJECTED"` only — `CANCELLED` and `EXPIRED` are system-set |

**On ACCEPTED:** A Match record is created between the two users and a `MATCH_CREATED` event is emitted.

**On REJECTED:** Request is closed. No match created.

**Uses `{{MATCH_REQUEST_ID}}`** — auto-set by the Send Match Request test script.

🔒 Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{ACCESS_TOKEN}}`

response.name: 400 Request already handled
400 Invalid status value
403 Not the receiver

request.description:
Reject a received match request. Same endpoint as Accept — only the body differs.

See **Respond to Match Request (Accept)** for full documentation.

item.name: 💞 Matches
item.description:
A Match is created when a request is accepted (manually or via auto-match).

Matches enable messaging between the two users.

request.description:
Returns all active matches for the authenticated user.

A match appears here once a request has been accepted — either manually via `respond`, or automatically when both users send requests to each other.

🔒 Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{ACCESS_TOKEN}}`

item.name: 🧪 E2E Flow (Run in Order)
item.description:
Complete matching flow between two users. User A discovers and requests User B. User B accepts.

**Setup before running:**
1. Have two users registered and onboarded
2. Set `ACCESS_TOKEN` to User A's token
3. Set `OTHER_USER_ID` to User B's user ID
4. Ensure both wallets have coins

**Order:**
1. User A sets preferences
2. User A requests discovery
3. User A sends match request to User B
4. Switch `ACCESS_TOKEN` to User B
5. User B views received requests
6. User B accepts the request
7. Switch back to User A and verify match appears

body.raw:
{
  "preferredGenders": ["Woman"],
  "ageMin": 22,
  "ageMax": 35,
  "locationPreference": "Anywhere",
  "religionPreference": "Open to all",
  "culturePreference": "Open to all",
  "childrenPreference": "Open",
  "faithPractice": "Not very",
  "energyDescription": "Calm",
  "communicationStyle": "Direct",
  "tuesdayFeeling": "Netflix at home",
  "energyMatchStyle": "Complement each other",
  "ambitionImportance": "Very",
  "socialLevel": "Balanced",
  "lifestylePreference": "Any",
  "financialStabilityPreference": "Open",
  "financialStagePreference": "Open",
  "idealPartnerType": "Kind and grounded",
  "matchVoicePrompt": "Looking for something real and lasting",
  "minCompatibilityScore": 30
}

request.description: Test script auto-saves the first candidate's ID as OTHER_USER_ID if not already set.

item.name: 3. Send Match Request (User A → User B)

request.description: Switch ACCESS_TOKEN to User B before running this step.
ACCESS_TOKEN must still be User B's token.
Switch ACCESS_TOKEN back to User A. Verify the match appears.
